cases.description: Gate runner dispatches this skill at plan→decompose transition
cases.prompt: [Internal] Gate runner invokes gate-deep-modules with plan_artifact_path.
expectations: Skill runs as a forked subagent (disable-model-invocation: true)
Skill reads the plan markdown at the provided path
Skill identifies modules in the plan's 'Modules and contracts' section
Skill applies the deletion test to each module
Skill returns structured JSON conforming to schemas/gate-result.schema.json — never prose

cases.description: Identifies shallow modules with one-line reason and suggested deepening
cases.prompt: [Internal] Plan proposes UserValidator with 4 methods, each <5 lines.
expectations: Skill flags UserValidator as shallow (interface complexity ~ implementation complexity)
Skill applies the deletion test: would deleting UserValidator concentrate or spread complexity?
If shallow, JSON output includes the module + one-line reason + suggested deepening

cases.description: Modules with high leverage pass without recommendation
cases.prompt: [Internal] Plan proposes OrderIntake with 1 method that hides 200 lines of business logic.
expectations: Skill recognizes OrderIntake as deep (small interface, large implementation)
Skill does NOT suggest deepening — already deep
JSON output marks OrderIntake as 'pass' with empty issues array

cases.description: Output is strictly JSON, never prose
expectations: Output is valid JSON parsable by the gate runner
Output contains check_id, verdict ('pass' | 'fail'), summary, evidence, suggested_action, tokens_consumed
Output does NOT contain markdown, prose explanation, or chat preamble
